summary: End-to-end testing of Last Mile Planner (FastAPI + React + MongoDB). 8/8 pytest backend tests passed (sync status, full sync ~14s, plan with data, plan empty-date, plan invalid-date 400, export-all xlsx, export-hub xlsx, export-hub 404). Frontend e2e (Playwright) confirms app loads, KPIs render (Hubs 16, Orders 297, Returns 168 for 2026-06-23), helper chips show +2/-2 dates, 16 hub tabs render with hub-tab-<HubName> testids, Ahmedabad HUB tab opens orders-table (60 rows) and returns-table (35 rows), Download All Hubs triggers last_mile_plan_2026-06-23.xlsx download, Download Hub triggers plan_Ahmedabad_HUB_2026-06-23.xlsx download, empty date (2030-01-01) shows 'Nothing to plan' empty state.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 516 lines and combines sync, planning, and Excel export — could be split into routers/services modules for maintainability if it grows further.

Each /api/plan/export call rebuilds the plan and workbook in-process synchronously (openpyxl is CPU-bound) — fine at current data sizes but consider running build_workbook in a thread pool (run_in_threadpool) to avoid blocking the event loop for large plans.

Date parsing for delivery_date relies on string formats from the sheet; to_date_str silently returns None on parse failures and those orders will never match any plan_date — consider logging unparseable dates during sync.
/api/sync deletes all collections before inserts (non-atomic) — a fetch failure mid-way would leave data wiped; consider staging into temp collections or wrapping in a transaction.
CORS allow_origins defaults to '*' with allow_credentials=True which is invalid per CORS spec — works in dev but should be explicit in prod.
test_credentials: N/A - no auth, public Google Sheet
seed_data_creation: None - existing synced data used (orders=2521, returns=1888 after re-sync, serviceable=176, libraries=124). Note: returns_count from /api/sync/status returned 1888 (not 3139 mentioned in request) — this reflects current sheet contents.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests at /app/backend/tests/test_last_mile_planner.py. Run: pytest /app/backend/tests/ -v. The exact-2-days rule is validated by asserting every order.delivery_date == plan_date+2 and every return.request_date == plan_date-2 with return_status==RETURN_REQUESTED in test_plan_with_data. Frontend public URL: https://hub-dispatch-1.preview.emergentagent.com.
